ayahs.arabic: أَلَمۡ تَرَ كَيۡفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡفِيلِ
ayahs.translation: Have you not considered, [O Muhammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara kayfa faAAala rabbuka biashabi alfeeli

ayahs.translation: Did He not make their plan into misguidance
And He sent against them birds in flocks
Striking them with stones of hard clay
And He made them like eaten straw
